calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Oaktown Ventures, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Newton J. Lam. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Ryan L. Dahm, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Birite Restaurant Supply, Inc., a corporation, dba Birite Foodservice Distributors.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Oaktown Ventures, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on January 17, 2018 and served on January 23, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on February 13, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 1, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 30, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Birite Restaurant Supply, Inc., a corporation, dba Birite Foodservice Distributors, and against the Defaulted Defendant Oaktown Ventures, LLC, a California limited liability company, as follows:

Damages - $27,914.23.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,017.45.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $600.00.

Total - $30,531.68.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Dahm, Esq. 415-989-4730 of Cook collection Attorney P.C. for Plaintiff BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows

PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment.

Plaintiff Birite Restaurant Supply, Inc.'s application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment against defendant Oaktown Ventures, LLC is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
